title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: A Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building continuous evaluation pipelines for multi-agent systems using Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Cloud Run. The approach combines data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics, tool use quality metrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD automation to ensure production agent quality and detect regressions.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building continuous evaluation pipelines for multi-agent systems using the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Cloud Run. The method combines data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics, tool use quality metrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD automation. The goal is to maintain production agent quality and detect regressions before they reach users.
